# 1ai-skills

> 1337 production-ready AI agent skills with anti-rationalization tables, code examples, and verification checklists. The largest open-source skill library for Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more.

## What

1ai-skills is a library of 1337 SKILL.md files across 19 categories that force AI coding agents to follow real workflows instead of cutting corners. Every skill includes anti-rationalization tables, concrete code examples, step-by-step workflows, and verification checklists.

## Categories

- **Cybersecurity** (786 skills) — Threat hunting, forensics, pen testing, SOC ops, incident response, zero trust, cloud security, API security, OT/ICS security
- **Development** (92 skills) — TDD, debugging, code review, PRD, spec-driven development, context engineering, browser testing, Git workflows
- **Content** (64 skills) — Video generation, audio, design, writing, document creation (docx, pdf, pptx, xlsx), UI design, themes
- **Mindset** (55 skills) — Negotiation, leadership, critical thinking, emotional intelligence, productivity, habit formation
- **Marketing** (45 skills) — SEO, viral content, email marketing, ads, growth hacking, social media automation
- **Core** (44 skills) — AI infrastructure, memory systems, self-improvement, model routing, Gemini API, Replicate
- **Integrations** (36 skills) — GitHub, Discord, Notion, Slack, Stripe, Firebase, Supabase, BigQuery
- **DevOps** (33 skills) — Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, cloud ops, GitOps, Terraform, Ansible
- **Automation** (28 skills) — Bots, workflows, scrapers, n8n, Zapier, process automation
- **Research** (23 skills) — Deep research, market analysis, competitive intelligence, McKinsey framework
- **Trading** (20 skills) — Crypto, DeFi, Polymarket, trading strategies, risk management
- **Operations** (19 skills) — Business ops, governance, HR, legal, project management
- **Agents** (16 skills) — AI agent orchestration, coding agents, research agents, autonomous execution
- **MCP** (14 skills) — Model Context Protocol servers for GitHub, Slack, Stripe, Supabase, Notion
- **Meta** (13 skills) — Self-evolving meta-skills, performance monitoring, skill creation
- **Financial** (15 skills) — Finance analysis, valuation, tax, portfolio management
- **Sales** (14 skills) — Lead generation, CRM, outreach, sales automation
- **Data** (10 skills) — Data pipelines, analysis, visualization, ETL, Airflow, dbt
- **Productivity** (10 skills) — Calendars, email, meetings, workspace management

## Install

Claude Code: `/plugin marketplace add oyi77/1ai-skills && /plugin install 1ai-skills@1ai-skills`
Cursor: `git clone https://github.com/oyi77/1ai-skills.git && cp -r 1ai-skills/cybersecurity/* .cursor/rules/`
Gemini CLI: `gemini skills install https://github.com/oyi77/1ai-skills.git --path skills`

## Quality

- 1337/1337 skills pass 8-dimension test suite
- 0 warnings, 0 failures
- Every skill has anti-rationalization table
- Every skill has code examples
- Every skill has verification checklist
- Python syntax validated (ast.parse)
- Internal links verified
- Description quality enforced (50-200 chars)

## Keywords

AI agent skills, Claude Code skills, Cursor rules, Gemini CLI skills, agent skill library, anti-rationalization, cybersecurity skills, AI coding agent, SKILL.md, agent workflows, AI agent best practices, coding agent skills, MCP skills, Model Context Protocol, self-evolving skills, AI agent automation
